subcodes.first_line: O lover of the Beauty of the All-Glorious! In this time when the earthquake of tests hath set the world of being in motion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عاشق جمال ذوالجلال در این زمان که زلزله امتحان عالم امکانرا بحرکت آورده
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
